name: ayla-local-agent-vscode
description: AYLA embedded local coding agent for VS Code: one CLI process, one agent engine, one governed tool path.

chatParticipants.name: ayla-cli
chatParticipants.description: One embedded local coding agent engine. Prompts run through the same AYLA CLI, Gateway tool loop, worktree, validation, and evidence path.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show embedded AYLA CLI and local engine status.

commands.name: resume
commands.description: Resume the latest interrupted AYLA session with a task.

commands.name: apply
commands.description: Apply the latest reviewed AYLA worktree patch.

ayla.ollama.baseUrl.markdownDescription: Base URL of the local Ollama server used by the embedded AYLA CLI engine.

ayla.ollama.model.markdownDescription: Exact local Ollama model id. Leave empty to use the first installed model; gemma4:12b is recommended when available.

ayla.agent.maxSteps.markdownDescription: Maximum model/tool turns for one governed AYLA task.

ayla.agent.chatTimeoutMs.markdownDescription: Maximum time for one local model task, including tool turns.

ayla.embeddedCli.gatewayPort.markdownDescription: Loopback port for the embedded engine. Use 0 to reserve an isolated free port per VS Code window (recommended).

scripts.compile: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('out',{ recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p ./
scripts.gateway:test: npm run gateway:build && node gateway/scripts/run-test-files.js gateway/dist/tests/v11-v14.test.js gateway/dist/tests/v10-structured-protocol.test.js gateway/dist/tests/v9-classifier-runtime.test.js gateway/dist/tests/v9-python-loop.test.js gateway/dist/tests/v9-python-ast.test.js gateway/dist/tests/gateway.test.js
scripts.gateway:dev: npm run gateway:build && npm run gateway:start
